h40625c02g3534g4b2eg9336g125b31d20538: Our idol is gone again. Is this how you repay our kindness?!
h9722b5abgb88eg4974ga06agbbe0365a01b8: We gave you a second chance, and you squandered it. You should have left this place.
he0445535g45dag48a1g8699g840b7af029bb: You don't learn from your mistakes, do you? You leave us no choice.
h169feb61g42ffg46aeg99fega34ba42448fb: You thought you could get away this again? We've shown you enough mercy.
h5f5c6441g9e39g4d92g9fa8g35cbc297e9c7: Hold it! The Idol of Silvanus has vanished. Have you seen it?
h665700cbg9fcag4d23g9879g51c534a8499f: You there! Have you seen our sacred idol? It's gone missing!
hbeec31b2g7553g41c8g9dccgc7ea409fe369: Halt! Someone has stolen our idol again. Do you know where it is?
ha92fd2f8gae12g4668g89fag7b21182a6b9d: A rotting blight, stealing relics. Begone.
hab4a5a72gbc7ag48e1g9a6eg85c944bfa9c5: And here I thought we'd made peace. I hope Silvanus strikes you down.
h3d386c7dg472eg4907gbe56g374ccce07839: I knew we couldn't trust you outsiders. You need to leave.
he67b5421g5075g4241gb9eag1b4020ccac4f: Ungrateful rat. We'll be watching you.
h37dd60fbgf059g45dcg9409g0836a1327909: Yes, it's in my bag. But if you tell anyone, I'll rip your tongue out.
he514523cg5e9bg4ddfg86c6geebd54b8df98: Take it. Let the gods judge your actions.
hef79abd0ge179g4356g9b1cg93ae9ed981d8: Fine. Leave. But know that the gods won't stand for this.
h238bfb18g407bg4b1cgb176gd74625e62d1d: Take it. But you will regret your sacrilege, believe you me.
h79b4c110gaeecg4fbbgaff4g7d4203a0dc34: You can have it. Just please let us be.
h492b4872g4952g4976ga6b0g1c8c0998a7a2: You think you can threaten us in our own grove? The wilds will feast on your flesh.
h605e8c9ag3dc1g4214g8a87gc664fd1bfbc2: The trees take you and feed on your rotting corpse.
h9bb78f39g27bfg4fdeg833cg0ee5d5d3e923: Silvanus guide us. You've sealed your own fate.
h5fac2f75g0107g4f1dga6f2g301c492e7fae: We gave our lives to Silvanus. It's not something you can take from us.
hcb9c9686g7f06g4483g9a25g5b3c18374c95: I've found the thief - a servant of Zevlor. To arms!
h1a15d1d1g67a9g4343g9d45gd5f23eaea389: Over here! I caught the thief!
hb459ba2dgade3g4ddag8f74g6d0504b5d98d: I'm afraid I haven't seen it, sorry.
h3100f73fgdc94g4b01g8737gb7cc6e93c78f: No need to apologise. This isn't your responsibility.
h5dbacc74gc080g41c3g86e3g4a7106952a5b: Then it's those tieflings again. Hells.
hc6e3caf4g2375g447dgaaffga4d2a1715541: Let us know if you see anything. Nature will thank you.
hd40aed1fg8ad2g45f8g80f1g34976a1c7c71: Those children are better liars than you are.
h18d0ce5dg3727g415cg8806g05fe913763ba: Even in this form, I can smell your dishonesty.
h7fb4abcegf7e1g4e75g97cdg5958a2afa10c: We've been patient. But that ends now.
